title: Accelerator release manifest
description: The signed distribution contract between the release signer (emitting manifest.json + manifest.minisig) and the launcher/bootstrap readers. schema_version gates breaking shape changes; version is checked for exact equality against the launcher's own CARGO_PKG_VERSION (anti-rollback). Additive unknown fields are tolerated by the reader.

schema_version.description: The manifest shape version. A reader fails closed on an unrecognised higher value.

version.description: The plugin/launcher version this manifest describes.

binaries.description: Sub-binary name -> entry. Empty is valid (no external subcommands yet).

description.description: One-line help text shown in the synthesised external-subcommands section.

platforms.description: Platform alias -> per-platform asset. Aliases are single-sourced from tasks/shared/targets.py.

sha256.description: Lowercase hex sha256, optionally 'sha256:'-prefixed. All-zeros is the 'no binary for this version' sentinel.

signature.description: The inline .minisig contents (untrusted comment / base64 / trusted comment / base64), newline-joined.
